summary: Patrick McKenzie announces an upcoming interview with Andrew Warner on Mixergy, scheduled for the next day. The interview will focus on his business biography, covering the story of Bingo Card Creator and his entrepreneurial journey. He acknowledges that regular readers may already know much of the material but suggests Andrew Warner's interviewing skills will surface new insights. He invites readers to suggest topics they'd like covered in the interview.
key_points: McKenzie is being interviewed on Mixergy, a well-known entrepreneur interview platform, signaling growing recognition in the startup community
The interview format is a live business biography with audience participation via chatroom
He actively solicits reader input on interview topics, demonstrating community engagement
money_quotes: Andrew has a way of wheedling secrets out of people so I'm sure you'll still enjoy it.
key_insight: Getting interviewed on established platforms is a milestone that signals growing authority and provides marketing exposure for a small software business.
